mechanism: BoJ normalization could trigger Japanese institutional repatriation from long-duration USTs, amplifying the positive correlation at the long end while leaving short-end dynamics driven by Fed cyclical policy unchanged, widening the maturity-dependent bifurcation.
regime_dependence: Holds if BoJ normalization is rapid rather than gradual. Japanese institutional inertia (historical repatriation ~30% of model-predicted) dampens the effect. Depends on currency hedging economics and BoJ communication.
